title: CF-NEON-R2 Hosted TEST Validation
description: Execute the governed hosted TEST validation contract against the Cloudflare Workers, Neon Postgres, and R2 finalist with explicit cross-provider failure handling and comparable evidence capture.
acceptance_criteria: Cloudflare and Neon TEST identities, TEST credentials, and teardown authority are available without production credential reuse
The split-provider TEST runtime is provisioned within the authorized cost boundary
Governed synthetic import preserves canonical and evidence-plane separation across providers
Boundary isolation, transaction recovery, portability, observability privacy, and cross-provider interruption paths pass
Cross-provider latency, egress, quota, trust-boundary, and support-routing evidence is captured
Credential revocation and provider-specific teardown leave no active hosted TEST authority
Final state reconstructs from governed exports after complete environment teardown
